classes.reasoning: The document explicitly identifies itself as 'IB-006 — Investigator Brochure' in the title and presents comprehensive drug information for BRC-883 (Cardanezumab), including safety data, monitoring guidance, clinical trial updates, and dosing information—all characteristic of an Investigator Brochure.

summary: This is Edition 2 of the Investigator Brochure for BRC-883 (Cardanezumab), dated 01 August 2024, which supersedes Edition 1 from 05 September 2023. The document presents updated safety information from Phase III trial BIORCE-CAR-2024-007, including a new hepatic safety finding (3 cases of ALT >5x ULN), revised monitoring guidance, and exploratory pediatric pilot data in adolescents aged 14-17 with HeFH.
